description_long: This town hall is a stately, symmetrical building with two prominent clock towers topped by ornate, dark-colored domes. The roof is steeply pitched and covered with reddish-brown tiles, featuring a central gable and decorative eaves. The facade is adorned with arched windows, pilasters, and a central entrance framed by a stone surround. Each tower displays a large clock face, adding both function and visual interest. The walls are a warm beige color, and the overall structure exudes a historic, Baroque-inspired architectural style. The building's design suggests civic importance and a welcoming presence in an urban setting.
description: A grand, beige town hall with two clock towers, ornate domes, and a tiled roof, featuring arched windows and a central entrance.
description_view_0: The view highlights the twin clock towers with black domes and the detailed, tiled roof stretching down the length of the building.
description_view_1: This side view shows the long, tiled roof, a row of arched windows, and one of the clock towers with its ornate dome.
description_view_2: The front view displays the symmetrical facade, central entrance with stone framing, both clock towers, and the main set of arched windows.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the other clock tower, tiled roof, and a series of arched windows.
attribute_facade_ornamentation: Clock towers with domes, arched windows, pilasters, decorative eaves, and stone-framed entrance
attribute_entrance_design: Single central entrance with double wooden doors, stone surround, and arched transom window above
